### Post by FuzZy2006 on 2006-07-20
I tried to use XGL with Compiz. I used the manual from the forums. I have a nv gf 6600 gt agp . My xorg.conf file looks like this : ```
# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#

Section "Files"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/misc"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/cyrillic"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi/:unscaled"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi/:unscaled"

	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi"

EndSection

Section "Module"
	Load	"bitmap"
	Load	"ddc"
	Load	"dri"

	Load	"freetype"

EndSection

Section "InputDevice"

	Driver		"kbd"
	Option		"CoreKeyboard"
	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"
	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc104"
	Option		"XkbLayout"	"us"
EndSection

	Driver		"mouse"
	Option		"CorePointer"
	Option		"Device"		"/dev/input/mice"
	Option		"Protocol"		"ExplorerPS/2"
	Option		"ZAxisMapping"		"4 5"

  Option        "ForceDevice"   "ISDV4"               # Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

  Option        "Device"        "/dev/wacom"          # Change to 
                                                      # /dev/input/event
                                                      # for USB
  Option        "Type"          "eraser"
  Option        "ForceDevice"   "ISDV4"               # Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

  Driver        "wacom"
  Identifier    "cursor"
  Option        "Device"        "/dev/wacom"          # Change to 
                                                      # /dev/input/event
                                                      # for USB
  Option        "Type"          "cursor"
  Option        "ForceDevice"   "ISDV4"               # Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

Section "Device"
	Identifier	"NVIDIA GeForce 6600"
	Driver		"nvidia"
	BusID		"PCI:2:0:0"
	Option 		"RenderAccel" 		"true"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier	"DELL M992"
	Option		"DPMS"
	HorizSync	30-96
	VertRefresh	50-160
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier	"Default Screen"
	Device		"NVIDIA GeForce 6600"
	Monitor		"DELL M992"
	DefaultDepth	24
	SubSection "Display"

EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"
	Identifier	"Default Layout"

	InputDevice	"Generic Keyboard"
	InputDevice	"Configured Mouse"
	InputDevice     "stylus" "SendCoreEvents"
	InputDevice     "cursor" "SendCoreEvents"

EndSection

	Mode	0666

```
I edited sudo gedit /usr/bin/thefuture by writing into it :
```
#!/bin/bash
gnome-window-decorator &  compiz --replace gconf decoration wobbly fade minimize cube rotate zoom scale move resize place switcher &

```

Now I restarted and wrote in the terminal the command ```
thefuture
```
It says ```
gnome-window-decorator, Failed to load shadow images
fuzzy@fuzzy-desktop:~$ compiz.real: No composite extension

```
Where am I wrong?
